personalInfo.name: Jason Rae
personalInfo.title: Senior Data Analyst EMEA | Commercial Analytics Architect | Applied AI & Decision Intelligence Leader
personalInfo.summary: Commercial analytics and applied AI leader with 13+ years across sales leadership, EMEA analytics, pricing, forecasting, margin analysis, CRM governance, acquisition integration and data transformation. Proven record of building commercial systems from zero, improving sales performance, correcting broken reporting logic and translating fragmented data into trusted executive decision systems. Brings hands-on BI, analytics engineering, automation, and applied AI capability in service of clearer commercial decisions across Sales, Finance, BI and executive stakeholder environments.

experience.title: Senior Data Analyst EMEA
experience.description: Own and develop EMEA commercial analytics architecture across gross margin walks, pricing intelligence, forecasting, CRM analytics, opportunity identification, incentives and executive business review support. Build decision-ready reporting, automation, and analytical workflows across Power BI, Python, SQL, ML, and deterministic GPT-4 where they improve auditability and speed.

achievements.text: Own and develop EMEA commercial analytics architecture across gross margin walks, pricing intelligence, forecasting, CRM analytics and executive business review support
Build decision-ready reporting, automation, and analytical workflows across Power BI, Python, SQL, ML, and deterministic GPT-4 where they improve auditability and speed
Support European leadership with forecasting governance, CRM quality improvement, pricing interpretation, margin analysis and business review narratives
Lead applied AI and analytics enablement — translating technical concepts into practical commercial use cases, training approaches and governance models
Operate as a cross-functional bridge between Sales, Finance, BI, IT and Supply Chain to resolve data-quality, reporting and decision-system issues

experience.title: Senior Data Analyst Europe
experience.description: Reporting to the SVP of Sales for Europe, combining commercial analytics leadership with UK key account sales development. Led European forecasting, pricing, financial integrity, and decision-system improvement, with applied AI introduced only where it served real workflows.

achievements.text: Achieved €1.3M in UK sales growth in 2023, surpassing target by more than fourfold — independently

Fully handled two acquisitions end to end, partnering with the BI team on credits, customer/account-level data refactoring, and country-by-country customer matching to ensure clean data transfer and reliable performance measurement
Led European contribution to a global applied AI initiative by building a training program from scratch that enabled commercial teams to use AI safely across real business workflows
Resolved historical discrepancies in country P&L reporting by identifying and correcting systemic FX methodology errors, restoring alignment between local and group financials
Re-engineered Price / Quantity / FX decomposition logic to correctly model interaction effects and eliminate mis-attributed growth and margin drivers in commercial analytics
Designed and implemented advanced bonus payment system, significantly improving security, accuracy, and reliability
Discovered FX implementation defects in pricing systems, preventing systematic margin distortion across multiple European markets

experience.title: Inside Sales Department Manager / BDM UK
experience.description: Selected to launch a new Inside Sales department for UK market expansion. Overcame pandemic and GDPR constraints to build a high-performing channel, independently out-performing all European sales representatives.

achievements.text: Achieved €3M in sales growth against an initial annual target of ~€300k — surpassing the combined performance of all European Sales Representatives
Identified 120 new distributors and secured 33 new accounts in a highly constrained market
Developed advanced analytics tools including customer segmentation, forecasting, market analysis, and backorder analysis to optimise sales processes
Identified and corrected costing discrepancies, securing double-digit improvements in cost basis through factory collaboration

experience.title: Inside Sales Department Manager
experience.description: Reinstated to lead a turnaround of the Inside Sales division, leveraging AI and data analytics to transform operations across 38 customer markets.

achievements.text: Grew divisional sales from 4% to 57% growth — a complete operational turnaround
Architected a Customer Management System from the ground up, incorporating AI, analytical tools, and rigorous data management
Transformed customer service personnel into award-winning sales professionals through intensive training — multiple STAR award recipients

experience.title: Account Manager — NSW & ACT
experience.description: Took on the least profitable territory in Australia and delivered the highest profitability in the country within two years.

achievements.text: Grew territory revenue from $1.4M to $4.2M — a 3× increase in two years
Improved territory profitability to 35% — the highest in Australia
Named Account Manager of the Year and earned two STAR Award trips

experience.title: Pilot
experience.description: Completed rigorous pilot training at ADFA (UNSW), developing rapid learning capability, disciplined systems thinking, and high-performance decision-making under pressure.

achievements.text: Earned Commandant Commendation Academic and Deputy Commandant Commendation Academic ×3 at ADFA
Developed rapid learning, high-stakes decision-making, and performance-under-pressure skills foundational to all subsequent career success

highlights: Divisional Representative, Mess Committee, Precision Drill Team

personalProjects.title: Algorithmic Trading AI System
personalProjects.summary: Production-grade machine-learning proof of work demonstrating model governance, promotion controls, observability, and automated execution discipline across a complex multi-model environment.

personalProjects.title: AI Memoir & Narrative Pipeline (Bibliography)
personalProjects.summary: Deterministic GPT-4 proof of work showing retrieval-grounded generation, atomic patching, quality gates, and auditable LLM workflow design rather than prompt-and-pray experimentation.

personalProjects.title: AI Desktop Agent Orchestrator
personalProjects.summary: Operational AI orchestration proof of work demonstrating multi-agent coordination, approval handling, transcript quality control, and cost-aware automation across concurrent workflows.

personalProjects.title: Multilingual Travel Authorization SaaS (visa-platform)
personalProjects.summary: Full-stack SaaS proof of work demonstrating regulated workflow design, multilingual UX, payment integration, and AI-assisted policy monitoring in a compliance-sensitive environment.
